title: MCA ने बढ़ाई DPT-3 फाइलिंग की आखिरी तारीख: अब 31 जुलाई 2026 तक कर सकेंगे फाइल
content:
# MCA ने बढ़ाई DPT-3 फाइलिंग की आखिरी तारीख: अब 31 जुलाई 2026 तक कर सकेंगे फाइल

Ek important update hai for all companies! Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) ne Form DPT-3 filing ki due date extend kar di hai. Yeh extension MCA Data Centre mein hui fire incident aur uske baad chal rahe restoration work ke kaaran diya gaya hai.

*   **Old Due Date:** Form DPT-3 financial year 2025-2026 ke liye file karne ki pehle ki due date 30th June 2026 thi.
*   **New Due Date:** Ab companies 31st July 2026 tak Form DPT-3 without any additional fees file kar sakengi.
*   **Circular Details:** Yeh relaxation General Circular No. 02/2026 dated June 19, 2026, ke through announce kiya gaya hai.

Is decision se companies ko compliance pura karne mein kaafi relief milega.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.mca.gov.in/)

*Published on: 20 June 2026*
